evals.prompt: Do a deep investigation of YEMANITY s.r.o. (ICO 55002072). This is a young company (founded 2022) with 892K EUR in CRZ contracts, registered as a business consulting firm but winning construction contracts. Run Phases 1-2 only (contract mapping + hidden entity expansion). Do NOT use browser automation (no RPVS, no foaf.sk, no UVO).
evals.expected_output: Complete contract mapping, red flags, extraction data, hidden entities, and framework analysis for YEMANITY

assertions.name: maps_all_contracts
assertions.text: Queries all CRZ contracts for ICO 55002072, showing contract names, buyers, amounts, and dates

assertions.name: extracts_red_flags
assertions.text: Queries red_flags table for YEMANITY's contracts, showing flag types and severities

assertions.name: checks_hidden_entities
assertions.text: Queries extractions table for hidden entities in YEMANITY's contracts

assertions.name: identifies_framework
assertions.text: Checks if contracts share naming patterns and queries related framework contracts

assertions.name: structured_output
assertions.text: Output follows the deep investigation report template in Slovak with zlte stopy tables

evals.prompt: Deep investigate DREVEX EU, s.r.o. (ICO 36835463) — a furniture manufacturer from Prievidza with 913K EUR in CRZ contracts. One of their contracts (212K EUR amendment) is just below the EU procurement threshold (215K). Run db-only scope (Phases 1-2 only, no browser).
evals.expected_output: Contract mapping with threshold gaming analysis, hidden entities, and red flags

assertions.name: maps_contracts
assertions.text: Queries all CRZ contracts for ICO 36835463 with amounts and dates

assertions.name: flags_threshold_gaming
assertions.text: Identifies or notes the threshold gaming pattern (212K near 215K EU limit)

assertions.name: checks_extractions
assertions.text: Queries extraction data for hidden entities and contract details

assertions.name: applies_phase_gate
assertions.text: After Phases 1-2, assesses whether deeper investigation is warranted based on findings
